global_rules.philosophy: Institutional Algorithmic Trading Terminal. Premium, deep, mysterious, but highly functional. Moving away from cheap 'neon cyberpunk' to 'high-end luxury tech'.
global_rules.animations: CSS-only for performance. Rely on `active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-200 ease-out` for all interactive elements to simulate haptic feedback without JS bloat.
global_rules.performance: Minimize heavy DOM nodes. Use CSS gradients instead of large images. Use `content-visibility: auto` on off-screen drawers.
global_rules.accessibility: Maintain minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text. Use `data-testid` on all interactive elements.

headings.usage: H1/H2, EA Name, Welcome Popups, Key Metrics. Never use Inter.

monospace.usage: EA Status Terminal, live numbers, balances, PnL.

layout_and_spacing.app_container: Mobile-first width constraints. Desktop view: `max-w-[400px] mx-auto h-[850px] max-h-[95vh] relative rounded-[40px] overflow-hidden border border-white/10 shadow-[0_0_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] bg-[#09090B]`. Desktop background framing: Deep, elegant abstract mesh gradient (CSS only).
layout_and_spacing.mobile_canvas: `w-full h-full min-h-screen md:min-h-[850px] flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden`
layout_and_spacing.grid: Control Room Grid (Dense). `gap-3` or `gap-4` for maximum data density.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Cardless or 'Crystal Glass' approach. `bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-4`. Remove massive neon drop-shadows. Replace with 1px inner strokes and ambient glow.

auth_stages.email_entry: Minimalist luxury. Centered brand logo, large elegant input field (`border-b` only or fully rounded pill). Huge, high-contrast submit button. Smooth CSS fade-in.
auth_stages.license_activation: Similar to email, but input is heavily letter-spaced (`tracking-[0.2em]`) for the key.

action_row_3_col.keep_or_upgrade: UPGRADE. Currently the most tapped element.
action_row_3_col.design: Unified 'Dynamic Island' style Segmented Control. A single pill-shaped container `bg-[#1C1C1F] p-1 rounded-full flex items-center`. 3 equal segments. Active/Start button is highly vibrant (Theme color). Others are muted. CSS haptic scale `active:scale-95`.

ea_status_terminal.design: Strict monospace log. `h-[160px] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl border border-white/5 p-3 overflow-y-auto font-mono text-[10px] relative`. Hide scrollbars `scrollbar-hide`. Fade-out mask at the top `mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, black 20%)`.
ea_status_terminal.tags: Status tags are tiny badges: `px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider bg-opacity-20`.

trading_style_picker.design: Horizontal scroll or tightly packed grid. Use subtle color gradients to indicate risk (Green for Scalping -> Red for Aggressive). Active state gets a 1px solid border of the theme color.

bottom_nav.design: Floating 'Dock' rather than full-width bar to feel more premium. `fixed bottom-6 left-4 right-4 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-2 flex justify-around items-center z-50`.

drawers.design: Slide up from bottom (`translate-y-full` to `translate-y-0`). `rounded-t-3xl bg-[#09090B] border-t border-white/10`. Header of drawer has a small gray drag handle `w-12 h-1 bg-white/20 rounded-full mx-auto mt-2`.

micro_features.haptic_feedback: Add `active:scale-[0.97]` to all buttons and cards.
micro_features.status_pulse: The START/STOP button and EA Avatar should have a tiny absolute positioned pulsing dot (`animate-ping`) when EA is active.
micro_features.loaders: Use pure CSS shimmering skeletons for initial data load `animate-pulse bg-white/5`.
micro_features.scroll_behavior: Add `scroll-smooth` to terminal. Hide scrollbars universally using custom CSS classes `[&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden`.

media.hero_backgrounds: Use CSS radial gradients. Example: `background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(var(--theme-primary), 0.15) 0%, transparent 50%)`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load `Cabinet Grotesk`, `Manrope`, and `JetBrains Mono` from Google Fonts or a reliable CDN in `index.html`.
Do NOT use heavy JavaScript animation libraries like Framer Motion for simple clicks. Rely on Tailwind's `transition-transform duration-200 active:scale-95`.
Refactor the 2500-line `MobileApp.jsx` monolith into smaller functional components where possible, or strictly organize it if keeping as monolith.
Retain all existing state logic, API calls (`/api/mobile/...`), and strict `data-testid` attributes.
Apply the 'Luxury / Performance Pro' dark theme. Remove all existing massive neon drop-shadows.
Implement the Desktop framing: wrap the entire app in a centered 400x850 container if window width > 768px. Fill the rest of the desktop body with a dark abstract background.
Build the EA Status Terminal as a highly readable, dense, command-line interface.
